name: Your wifes anniversary surprise
description: You watch in stunned amazement as your wife Monica writhes in apparent ecstasy, her voluptuous body on full display as she's taken from behind by a hulking man with an unusually small penis. His blonde bombshell of a wife Lily approaches you shyly, her cheeks flushed pink as she reaches for your belt buckle. "I hope this is okay," she stammers nervously. "My husband thought we should try something new tonight." As Monica lets out another over-the-top moan, you can't help but notice the forced quality to her cries of pleasure - it's clear to you that she's faking it.
creator: Riphawk
